name: Thai Poly Acrylic Public Company Limited
summary: Thai Poly Acrylic Public Company Limited engages in the manufacture and distribution of acrylic, acrylonitrile butadiene styrene, high impact polystyrene, and other extruded plastic sheets in Thailand and internationally. The company offers general purpose, impact modified cast, sanitary ware, magic color, and LED block acrylic sheets, as well as light management solutions and acrylic diffusion products. It also provides extruded products, including ABS/HI.PS sheets, HD and LDPE.Net, PMMA and PS pattern, and PVC boards, as well as polypropylene profiles/boards/corrugated sheets under the ComPlas, MODEN PLAS, MAGIC COLOR, MODEN GLAS, and SuperGlas brands. Thai Poly Acrylic Public Company Limited was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Sam Phran, Thailand.
